signals.title: Enterprise client inquiry
signals.summary: Fortune 500 company interested in Jim's executive coaching program for Q3
signals.raw_text:
Hi Jim,

We've heard great things about your coaching approach. We're looking to bring in an expert for our executive team this quarter. Can we discuss a custom program?

Best,
Sarah from Acme Corp

signals.title: Member milestone: 500 active members
signals.summary: Skool community hit 500 active members. Engagement up 22% this week.
signals.raw_text:
🎉 Community Milestone

We just crossed 500 active members in the Skool community! This represents 22% growth in engagement metrics over the past week.

signals.title: June program participant feedback
signals.summary: Average satisfaction score: 9.2/10. Three participants interested in group coaching option.
signals.raw_text:
Jim,

June cohort feedback is in. Overall satisfaction is 9.2/10. Three participants mentioned interest in a group coaching option for next quarter.

Details attached.

signals.title: Assistant question: Can we automate invoice delivery?
signals.summary: Sarah asking if we can automate invoice delivery via email/Stripe
signals.raw_text: Hey Jim, quick question - can we set up automated invoice delivery to clients? Doing it manually each time is eating up time.

signals.title: Competitor pricing update
signals.summary: Similar coach raised pricing 15% this month. Market pressure increasing.
signals.raw_text: Market report: Top 3 competitors all raised prices 10-15% in June. Market sentiment suggests strong demand for premium coaching.
